title: schoenus macrocephalus
intro: Schoenus macrocephalus, also known as Giant Bald Sedge or Giant Hair Sedge, is a plant species in the family Cyperaceae. It is a perennial sedge native to Eastern Australia, used for its medicinal and herbal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Schoenus macrocephalus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of the mentioned health conditions.
